# Atlas Card France — synthetic terms fixture

This document is fictional and license-safe. It exists only to verify CardStats data modeling.

- Eligible users: residents of France aged 18 or older.
- Card: debit Mastercard; EUR base currency; purchases draw from a prefunded EUR balance.
- Core plan: EUR 0 monthly fee, 0.75% reward, EUR 12 monthly reward cap.
- Plus plan: EUR 7.99 monthly fee, 1.5% reward, EUR 40 monthly reward cap.
- Foreign exchange fee: 0.8% on both plans.
- The issuer fixture does not disclose an ATM fee.
- Monthly spend limit: EUR 15,000.

Effective 1 July 2026. Observed 12 July 2026.
